The future of Iraq
Till October 2004 establishment of democracy will be very difficult in Iraq. It will take
at least one year to keep the process moving. By October 2004 there will be tangible
results. US President George Bush will have some unpleasant moments. Bitterness and
criticism from his own people will haunt him.
World prediction for 2004
Thursday, 29 January , 2004, 14:50
“Not even a leaf can move without my consent,” says Sri Krshna in the holy Geeta.
Every single event is destined and has a divine connection, and every small action is
part of a bigger cosmic plan.

Incidents taking place in a person’s personal life or across the globe can easily be
predicted using their respective natal charts. And a close analysis can give enough
insights into the future of the world.
Our astrologer K Gopalakrishnan looks at the Cosmic Configuration of the planets to
